sections.description:
Lightweight contact form with file upload — live in under a minute, no setup required.

Skip bloated form builders and locked features. Just install, add the shortcode, and start receiving submissions instantly.

Includes:

  • Name, email, and message fields
  • Single file upload
  • Instant email notifications
  • Built-in submission storage

No subscriptions. No learning curve. No unnecessary features — just exactly what you need.
